dimension: CURRENT baseline (PRE-#210) of backendApi service layer + Sodax facade api exposure + ApiConfig/ConfigService — the branch Bridge would start from if #210 is NOT merged. Working tree branch `feat/demo-solver-status-panel` @ 1e37cd91 (off #250 base 3f71a013).

files_read.role: WORKING-TREE (v1) backend HTTP client. Single class, implements IConfigApi, flat ApiConfig, type-guard validation. NO sub-services.
Barrel: only `export * from './BackendApiService.js';` — single file exported.
Sodax facade. Constructs `this.backendApi = new BackendApiService(this.instanceConfig.api, logger)`. NO `this.api` alias. SwapService gets only {config,hubProvider,spoke}.

ConfigService — typed `api: BackendApiService`, calls `this.api.getAllConfig()` in initialize(). Has per-feature getters incl. `get bridge(): BridgeConfig` and `get bridgePartnerFee()`. NO nested API config.
v2 wire-contract types (ISwapsApiV2, IConfigApiV2, *RequestV2/*ResponseV2, SodaxConfigV2). ALREADY committed/present at base #250 + working tree, but UNUSED by the SDK runtime.
Defines flat `ApiConfig = { baseURL, timeout, headers }` + DEFAULT_BACKEND_API_* consts. NO BaseApiConfig/CustomApiConfig/SwapsApiConfig in working tree.

key_findings: WORKING-TREE BackendApiService.ts is a SINGLE monolithic class `export class BackendApiService implements IConfigApi` (v1 interface name, NOT IConfigApiV1). Constructor: `constructor(private readonly config: ApiConfig, logger: SodaxLogger = consoleLogger)`; sets `this.headers = { ...config.headers }`. There is NO sub-service: no `this.swaps`, no `public readonly swaps: SwapsApiService`.

WORKING-TREE BackendApiService private HTTP plumbing is INLINE in the class (not extracted): `private async makeRequest<T>(endpoint, config: RequestConfig): Promise<T>` (builds URL `config.baseURL ? config.baseURL+endpoint : this.config.baseURL+endpoint`, AbortController timeout `config.timeout ?? this.config.timeout`, throws 'HTTP_REQUEST_FAILED'/'REQUEST_TIMEOUT'/'UNKNOWN_REQUEST_ERROR') and `private async request<T>(endpoint, config): Promise<Result<T>>` which wraps makeRequest into `{ok:true,value}` / `{ok:false,error}`.

WORKING-TREE request/override config TYPES (`ApiResponse<T>`, `RequestConfig`, `RequestOverrideConfig`) are declared and exported FROM BackendApiService.ts itself (lines 34-58). RequestConfig method union is `'GET'|'POST'|'PUT'|'DELETE'`.

WORKING-TREE v1 endpoint surface (all return `Promise<Result<T>>`, never throw): intents — getIntentByTxHash(txHash, config?) `/intent/tx/{txHash}`, getIntentByHash(intentHash) `/intent/{intentHash}`, getUserIntents({userAddress,startDate?,endDate?,limit?,offset?}) `/intent/user/{userAddress}`; swaps submit — submitSwapTx(params: SubmitSwapTxRequest) POST `/swaps/submit-tx`, getSubmitSwapTxStatus(params: GetSubmitSwapTxStatusParams) GET `/swaps/submit-tx/status?txHash=&srcChainKey=`; solver — getOrderbook({offset,limit}) `/solver/orderbook`; money market — getMoneyMarketPosition, getAllMoneyMarketAssets, getMoneyMarketAsset, getMoneyMarketAssetBorrowers, getMoneyMarketAssetSuppliers, getAllMoneyMarketBorrowers; config (IConfigApi) — getAllConfig `/config/all`, getChains `/config/spoke/chains`, getSwapTokens, getSwapTokensByChainId, getMoneyMarketTokens, getMoneyMarketReserveAssets, getMoneyMarketTokensByChainId, getRelayChainIdMap, getSpokeChainConfig `/config/spoke/all-chains-configs`. Plus helpers setHeaders(headers) and getBaseURL():string returning `this.config.baseURL`.

WORKING-TREE response validation uses runtime TYPE GUARDS imported from `../shared/guards.js`: `isSubmitSwapTxResponse`, `isSubmitSwapTxStatusResponse`. On bad shape returns `{ok:false, error: new Error('Invalid submitSwapTx response: unexpected response shape')}`. There is NO valibot, NO schema files (backendApiSchemas/swapsApiSchemas/rawTxSchemas DO NOT EXIST in working tree).

WORKING-TREE Sodax.ts (118 lines) exposes `public readonly backendApi: BackendApiService` ONLY — there is NO `public readonly api` syntactic-sugar alias. Constructor builds it as `this.backendApi = new BackendApiService(this.instanceConfig.api, logger)` then passes it ONLY to ConfigService (`api: this.backendApi`). SwapService is constructed with `{ config, hubProvider, spoke }` — it does NOT receive `backendApi` and does NOT receive `useBackendSubmitTx`.

WORKING-TREE has NO `useBackendSubmitTx` / `swapsOptions` ANYWHERE (confirmed by repo-wide grep across packages/sdk/src and packages/types/src → NONE). The submit-tx-to-API + client-side-fallback toggle that #210 introduces simply does not exist on this baseline.

WORKING-TREE ApiConfig (packages/types/src/common/constants.ts line 20) is the FLAT shape only: `export type ApiConfig = { baseURL: HttpUrl; timeout: number; headers: Record<string,string> }`. There is NO `BaseApiConfig`, NO `SwapsApiConfig`, NO `CustomApiConfig` union (grep confirmed none in working-tree types). `SodaxConfig.api: ApiConfig` (sodax-config.ts) therefore carries one flat endpoint config; all services share one base URL.

WORKING-TREE ConfigService.ts types its dependency as `private readonly api: BackendApiService` (concrete class, imported as type from '../../backendApi/BackendApiService.js'); initialize() calls `await this.api.getAllConfig()` and version-gates against CONFIG_VERSION, re-layering userConfig overrides via mergeSodaxConfig. ConfigService ALREADY has bridge plumbing: `get bridge(): BridgeConfig { return this.sodax.bridge }` and `get bridgePartnerFee(): PartnerFee|undefined { return this.bridge.partnerFee ?? this.fee }`.

CRITICAL — the v2 TYPE CONTRACT is already present but the v2 RUNTIME is not. `packages/types/src/backend/backendApiV2.ts` (922 lines) exists at base #250 (3f71a013) and in the working tree, exporting the full Swaps API v2 wire types + `ISwapsApiV2` + `IConfigApiV2` + `SodaxConfigV2`/`GetAllConfigResponseV2` with compile-time bigint JSON-safety guards. But NO SDK runtime code references any `*V2` type or SwapsApiService in the working tree. So the contract layer is ahead of the implementation layer.

DELTA that #210 (origin/feat/swaps-api-v2) adds on top of this baseline — the shared foundation: (a) packages/types constants.ts replaces flat ApiConfig with `BaseApiConfig` + `SwapsApiConfig = BaseApiConfig` + `CustomApiConfig` (union `{baseApiConfig; swapsApiConfig?}` | `{baseApiConfig?; swapsApiConfig}`) + `ApiConfig = BaseApiConfig | CustomApiConfig`. (b) NEW file backendApi/apiConfig.ts: `isCustomApiConfig(config): config is CustomApiConfig`, `layerConfigs(...slices): BaseApiConfig` (defaults→base→swaps, headers merged), `resolveBaseApiConfig(config): BaseApiConfig`, `resolveSwapsApiConfig(config): SwapsApiConfig`. (c) NEW file backendApi/api-utils.ts: EXTRACTS `ApiResponse`/`RequestConfig`/`RequestOverrideConfig` out of BackendApiService, adds `MakeRequestParams`, free-function `makeRequest<T>(params)`, and `toJsonBody(value)` (bigint-safe JSON.stringify replacer). (d) NEW files backendApiSchemas.ts, swapsApiSchemas.ts, rawTxSchemas.ts — valibot schemas replacing hand-written guards. (e) NEW backendApi/SwapsApiService.ts (valibot-validated, makeRequest+toJsonBody, takes a resolved `SwapsApiConfig`).

DELTA in #210 BackendApiService.ts: renamed to `implements IConfigApiV1`; constructor `constructor(config: ApiConfig, logger = consoleLogger)` now does `this.config = resolveBaseApiConfig(config)` (config field typed `private readonly config: BaseApiConfig`), `this.swaps = new SwapsApiService(resolveSwapsApiConfig(config), this.logger)` exposing `public readonly swaps: SwapsApiService` as a SUB-SERVICE, and adds `private resolveRequestConfig(config: RequestConfig)` helper.

DELTA in #210 Sodax.ts: adds `public readonly api: BackendApiService` (= `this.api = this.backendApi` alias); reads `const useBackendSubmitTx = options?.swapsOptions?.useBackendSubmitTx ?? false`; passes BOTH `backendApi: this.backendApi` AND `useBackendSubmitTx` into `new SwapService({config,hubProvider,spoke,backendApi,useBackendSubmitTx})`. ConfigService construction is otherwise UNCHANGED (diff base..#210 for ConfigService.ts is EMPTY → #210 does NOT modify ConfigService).

DELTA in #210 types sodax-config.ts: adds client-side `swapsOptions?: SwapsClientOptions` (distinct key from data `swaps?: SwapsOptions`, so never collides) carrying `useBackendSubmitTx?: boolean` — a client-side runtime toggle on SodaxOptions, never merged into the backend-fetched SodaxConfig (same pattern as logger/analytics/fee).

Base/HEAD note: working-tree branch is feat/demo-solver-status-panel @ 1e37cd91, merge-base with origin/feat/swaps-api-v2 is f05c59c8; the prompt's diff base 3f71a013 is the #250 merge (feat recovery/withdrawal). Diffs base..#210 for Sodax.ts and ConfigService.ts both came back non-empty only for Sodax.ts content shown above; ConfigService.ts diff is empty.
replication_recipe: CONCLUSION ON DEPENDENCY: Bridge API CANNOT cleanly stand alone — it must be built ON TOP OF #210's shared foundation. The Swaps-API-v2 pattern that Bridge mirrors depends on three pieces that exist ONLY in #210, not in this baseline: (1) the `ApiConfig` UNION (`BaseApiConfig | CustomApiConfig` + `SwapsApiConfig`), (2) the extracted `backendApi/api-utils.ts` (`makeRequest`, `toJsonBody`, shared `RequestConfig`/`RequestOverrideConfig`), and (3) `backendApi/apiConfig.ts` (`isCustomApiConfig`/`layerConfigs`/`resolveBaseApiConfig`/`resolveSwapsApiConfig`) plus the sub-service composition pattern in BackendApiService (`this.swaps = new SwapsApiService(resolveSwapsApiConfig(config), logger)`).

RECOMMENDED SEQUENCING: rebase the Bridge work onto origin/feat/swaps-api-v2 (or wait until #210 merges to main). A `BridgeApiService` should follow the SAME composition as SwapsApiService: a sub-service of BackendApiService constructed as `this.bridge = new BridgeApiService(resolveBridgeApiConfig(config), this.logger)`. This REQUIRES first extending the #210 `ApiConfig` union with a `bridgeApiConfig?` slice on `CustomApiConfig` and adding a `resolveBridgeApiConfig(config)` in apiConfig.ts — i.e. Bridge extends, not duplicates, #210's apiConfig.ts/constants.ts.

IF #210 IS NOT MERGED AND BRIDGE CANNOT REBASE (stand-alone path): Bridge would have to RE-CREATE the entire #210 foundation inside its own PR — convert flat `ApiConfig` to the nested union in packages/types/common/constants.ts, create api-utils.ts (makeRequest/toJsonBody) and apiConfig.ts (resolve helpers), refactor BackendApiService to the sub-service shape, add the `this.api` alias + client-side option pattern to Sodax. This guarantees a hard MERGE CONFLICT with #210 on constants.ts (ApiConfig), backendApi/index.ts, backendApi/BackendApiService.ts, and Sodax.ts. Strongly avoid; treat #210 as a prerequisite/blocker.

GOOD NEWS for Bridge: the wire TYPE layer is partly pre-built. `packages/types/src/backend/backendApiV2.ts` (the Swaps v2 contract) is ALREADY committed on this baseline and at #250, and `ConfigService` ALREADY has `get bridge()` / `get bridgePartnerFee()`. So a Bridge equivalent only needs to add a sibling `bridgeApiV2.ts`-style contract (mirror `ISwapsApiV2`/`IConfigApiV2` shape: `*RequestV2`/`*ResponseV2` interfaces, an aggregating `IBridgeApiV2` interface, decimal-string projection of bigints, and the `_AssertJsonSafe`/`_ContainsBigint` compile-time guard) and re-export it from packages/types/src/backend/index.ts.

TO MIRROR THE PATTERN, the Bridge PR (on top of #210) must add: (1) packages/types backend/bridgeApiV2.ts — request/response wire types + IBridgeApiV2 interface, re-exported in backend/index.ts; (2) packages/types constants.ts — add `bridgeApiConfig?: BridgeApiConfig` slice to CustomApiConfig and `BridgeApiConfig = BaseApiConfig`; (3) packages/sdk backendApi/apiConfig.ts — add `resolveBridgeApiConfig(config): BridgeApiConfig` layering bridgeApiConfig over baseApiConfig over defaults; (4) packages/sdk backendApi/bridgeApiSchemas.ts — valibot schemas; (5) packages/sdk backendApi/BridgeApiService.ts — class using shared `makeRequest`+`toJsonBody`, taking a resolved `BridgeApiConfig`+logger, returning `Promise<Result<T>>`; (6) packages/sdk backendApi/BackendApiService.ts — add `public readonly bridge: BridgeApiService` constructed with `resolveBridgeApiConfig(config)`; (7) backendApi/index.ts — `export * from './BridgeApiService.js'`; (8) Sodax.ts + BridgeService — wire a client-side `bridgeOptions?.useBackendSubmitTx`-style toggle and pass `backendApi`+toggle into BridgeService exactly as #210 passes them into SwapService.

SUBMIT-TX + FALLBACK (useBackendSubmitTx) MECHANISM: This is a #210 invention absent from the baseline. Replicating for Bridge means adding a client-side `swapsOptions`-equivalent (`bridgeOptions` with `useBackendSubmitTx?: boolean`) on SodaxOptions in packages/types sodax-config.ts (distinct from the data `bridge` slot, never merged into the fetched SodaxConfig — same handling as logger/analytics/fee), reading it in Sodax constructor (`options?.bridgeOptions?.useBackendSubmitTx ?? false`), and injecting `backendApi` + the boolean into BridgeService so the bridge flow can route its submit-tx through the backend API (with client-side broadcast fallback) — fetch the #210 SwapService.createAndSubmitIntent/submit path in a separate dimension to copy the exact branch logic.
